title: PRE-FILING BANKRUPTCY COUNSELING PRE-DISCHARGE FINANCIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC PRE-FILING BANKRUPTCY COUNSELING PRE-DISCHARGE FINANCIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pre-filing bankruptcy counseling and pre-discharge education, both required for filing bankruptcy. 820 Crater Lake Avenue Suite 202 Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (541) 779-2273 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-2273 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Pre-filing counseling fee is $35 for individuals and $50 for couples. Pre-discharge education fee is $30 for individuals and $45 for couples. Cash or money order only. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On Crater Lake Avenue between Stevens and McAndrews in the Cedar Mall Services: Credit Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MONEY MANAGEMENT - CREDIT REPORT REVIEW MONEY MANAGEMENT - PERSONAL FINANCIAL COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC
